name: Software Delivery Workflow
objective: Plan, implement, verify, and package a software change with explicit evidence and failure states.

roles.role_spec: Define implementation scope, risks, and required artifacts.
roles.execution_spec: Use LLM reasoning to produce a task graph before any tool execution.
roles.output_spec: Return an implementation plan with gates and artifact expectations.

roles.role_spec: Evaluate code, tests, and release readiness.
roles.execution_spec: Use LLM review plus concrete test evidence before pass/fail.
roles.output_spec: Return verification status, evidence, risk notes, and failure_state when blocked.

gates.condition: Required tests completed with zero failures.
Expected artifacts exist and are inspectable.
gates.on_pass: Mark workflow ready for release review.
